mapper.select: SELECT m.*, si.id AS si_id, si.member_id AS si_member_id, si.day_name AS si_day_name, si.start_time AS si_start_time, si.end_time AS si_end_time FROM member m LEFT JOIN schedule_item si ON si.member_id = m.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, si.id AS si_id, si.member_id AS si_member_id, si.day_name AS si_day_name, si.start_time AS si_start_time, si.end_time AS si_end_time FROM member m LEFT JOIN schedule_item si ON si.member_id = m.id ORDER BY m.name

SELECT m.*, si.id AS si_id, si.member_id AS si_member_id, si.day_name AS si_day_name, si.start_time AS si_start_time, si.end_time AS si_end_time FROM member m LEFT JOIN schedule_item si ON si.member_id = m.id WHERE m.status = #{status} ORDER BY m.name
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM member WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (name, gender, start_date, phone, email, ssn, hourly_wage, hourly_wage2, health_cert_expiry, has_health_certificate, bank_name, bank_account, status, memo, payday, include_weekly_holiday_allowance, apply_tax, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{startDate}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{ssn}, #{hourlyWage}, #{hourlyWage2}, #{healthCertExpiry}, #{hasHealthCertificate}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccount}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{memo}, #{payday}, #{includeWeeklyHolidayAllowance}, #{applyTax}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, start_date = #{startDate}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, ssn = #{ssn}, hourly_wage = #{hourlyWage}, hourly_wage2 = #{hourlyWage2}, health_cert_expiry = #{healthCertExpiry}, has_health_certificate = #{hasHealthCertificate}, bank_name = #{bankName}, bank_account = #{bankAccount}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, memo = #{memo}, payday = #{payday}, include_weekly_holiday_allowance = #{includeWeeklyHolidayAllowance}, apply_tax = #{applyTax}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
